= Figma and SauceLabs integrations removed from Settings (draft)
:navtitle: Figma and SauceLabs integrations removed (draft)

The *Integration* tab in Settings no longer shows the *Figma Integration* card or the *SauceLabs Integration* card. Both integrations were deprecated and are no longer functional.

The *Integration* tab now displays three integrations on a single row:

* *Issue Tracking* (Jira)
* *Test Case Management* (TestRail)
* *Visual Validation* (Applitools)

Connect, disconnect, and login flows for Jira, TestRail, and Applitools are unchanged.
